Freddie Mac Gateway®

Freddie Mac Gateway ® is the entry point to access the Single-Family tools you need to manage your loans throughout the entire mortgage lifecycle.

  • Browse
  • All Insights & Research
  • All News & Announcements
  • Featured Topics
  • Mortgage Technology
  • Business
  • Market of the Future
  • Media
  • Home Starts Here Podcast

Freddie Mac Community Land Trust Database

Use this database to find community land trusts in your area and identify available housing units in their inventory for sale.

With Freddie Mac CLT mortgages, you can grow your business by offering affordable home financing to your borrowers and support lasting affordability in the communities you serve.

Contact your Freddie Mac representative or the Customer Contact Center (800-FREDDIE) for more information.

Additional Resources

  • CLT Mortgages
  • CLT Mortgage Training

Freddie Mac does not endorse, recommend or otherwise make any representations or warranties regarding any of the CLTs listed above and is not liable for any claims that may arise in connection with any party’s decision to do business with any of these CLTs.

This database is based on CLTs’ self-reporting about their program and is publicly available information. Freddie Mac is providing this information as a courtesy to our sellers and makes no claim to the accuracy of the data provided. Sellers are responsible for making certain that CLT mortgages meet all Single-Family Seller/Servicer Guide requirements.

CLT ground leases indicated as certified by Freddie Mac or Florida Housing Coalition (FHC) require prior written approval from Freddie Mac for sellers to take advantage of the certification in lieu of ground lease review. Please contact your Freddie Mac representative for prior written approval.
